$comment: Argos project-scope settings (shared, committed). Policy: GitHub WRITES (PRs/issues/merges/reviews) are hard-locked to github-mcp (mcp__github__*) — octocode has no write tools, so this holds automatically. octocode's GitHub READ tools (githubSearchCode = cross-repo grep, githubGetFileContent = pull docs from GitHub links, githubViewRepoStructure, etc.) are intentionally ALLOWED for code research. Bash gh is restricted to {workflow,secret,auth} by the user-global gh-cli-restrict.sh hook. Unwanted claude.ai connectors (Slack/Linear/Indeed/firecrawl) are denied as defense-in-depth — they are not currently bridged into CLI tool sessions anyway. Atlassian (Jira+Confluence) intentionally left available. Personal overrides go in .claude/settings.local.json (gitignored).
